// Copyright 2017 Lovell Fuller and others. // SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 'use strict'; const isLinux = () => process.platform === 'linux'; let report = null; const getReport = () => { if (!report) { /* istanbul ignore next */ if (isLinux() && process.report) { const orig = process.report.excludeNetwork; process.report.excludeNetwork = true; report = process.report.getReport(); process.report.excludeNetwork = orig; } else { report = {}; } } return report; }; module.exports = { isLinux, getReport };
